title: neonauclea navillei
intro: Neonauclea navillei, also known as the Naville's Neonauclea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neonauclea navillei include the potential treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, Neonauclea navillei is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties to promote overall health and well-being.
